ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer account */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the account was opened */,
  "statement_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of account statements */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "year_opened" INTEGER /* Year when the account was opened */,
  "month_opened" INTEGER /* Month when the account was opened */,
  "day_opened" INTEGER /* Day when the account was opened */,
  "account_age_years" INTEGER /* Age of the account in years */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Savings, Checking) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., Active, Dormant, Closed) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction or activity on the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for external reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_statement_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("statement_frequency") REFERENCES statement_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the district for time-sensitive operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction took place */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., Utilities, Salary, Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report, containing insights and analytics */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Monthly Summary, Annual Review) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_reports_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Manager, Analyst, Clerk) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., View Account, Generate Report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
